name: Goose — Multi-provider config
description: Standard Goose configuration with Anthropic provider and developer extensions.
content:
provider: anthropic
model: claude-sonnet-4-5

extensions:
  - name: developer
    type: builtin
  - name: memory
    type: builtin

# MCP server example
# - name: filesystem
#   type: stdio
#   cmd: npx -y @anthropic/mcp-server-filesystem

name: Goose — OpenAI config
description: Goose with OpenAI provider for GPT-4o workflows.
content:
provider: openai
model: gpt-4o

extensions:
  - name: developer
    type: builtin
